# Karma - Free AI Fortune and Saju
> Free Korean AI fortune platform for saju, daily fortune, yearly fortune, compatibility, tarot, face reading, and palm reading.

## About
Karma is a browser-based AI fortune service. Users can explore Korean saju, 2026 yearly fortune, daily fortune, compatibility, tarot readings, AI face reading, and AI palm reading without signup.

## Features
- Free AI saju analysis
- 2026 yearly fortune and daily fortune
- Saju compatibility and relationship readings
- Tarot card readings
- AI face reading and palm reading
- Korean and English pages
- No signup required

## Important Note
Karma provides entertainment and cultural interpretation. It is not professional financial, legal, medical, or psychological advice.

## Links
- Home: https://karma.archerlab.dev/
- Saju: https://karma.archerlab.dev/saju
- Daily fortune: https://karma.archerlab.dev/daily
- Tarot: https://karma.archerlab.dev/tarot
- Sitemap: https://karma.archerlab.dev/sitemap.xml
- Developer: https://archerlab.dev

## Languages
- Korean (한국어)
- English

## Category
AI Fortune, Saju, Tarot, Compatibility, Korean Astrology, Entertainment
